query: I'm styling my eww bar in eww.scss. I set background-color and padding on my .bar class and color on my buttons, but the buttons still have weird borders and padding I didn't ask for, and the font isn't mine. The CSS is clearly loading. What's wrong?
expected_behavior: Identifies that GTK applies its own opinionated default styles to every widget
Instructs to add * { all: unset; } as the very first rule at the top of eww.scss
Explains the reset sets every property to its initial value so rules build on a clean slate
Routes to SCSS_PATTERNS.md (the GTK reset patterns) and/or the SKILL.md reset section
notes: The single most common eww styling wall: without the global reset, GTK's default button relief/padding/borders and theme font bleed through and override custom rules. A naive answer would chase per-button overrides or !important instead of adding the one-line reset. Guards against missing the all:unset requirement.
